summary: Fleet Driver Profile page testing complete. All features working: Backend APIs (GET rides with forfait, PUT forfait), Frontend UI (driver header, month selector, summary cards, rides table, forfait inputs, save buttons, back navigation).

issues: React hydration warnings in console from Emergent preview wrapper injecting <span> into <tbody>/<tr> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.test_get_rides_default_month: PASS - Returns rides with correct structure
backend_tests.test_get_rides_with_month_filter: PASS - Filters rides by month correctly
backend_tests.test_get_rides_structure: PASS - Ride objects have all required fields (id, source, type, date, time, addresses, client, price, forfait)
backend_tests.test_get_rides_empty_month: PASS - Returns empty array for months with no rides
backend_tests.test_get_rides_totals_calculation: PASS - totalRides, totalPrice, totalForfait match calculated values
backend_tests.test_set_forfait_success: PASS - Saves forfait and verifies persistence via GET
backend_tests.test_february_vs_march: PASS - Different months return different date ranges
backend_tests.test_invalid_month_format: PASS - Falls back to current month gracefully
backend_tests.test_drivers_list_includes_vova: PASS - Driver list returns Vova with all fields

frontend_tests.driver_header: PASS - data-testid='driver-header' shows name, phone, email, status, rating
frontend_tests.rides_table: PASS - data-testid='rides-table' shows rides with columns
frontend_tests.forfait_amber_modified: PASS - Input turns amber when value changed
frontend_tests.table_footer_totals: PASS - Shows 'Total du mois (X courses)' with totals

verified_features: Backend: GET /api/fleet/drivers/{driver_id}/rides?month=YYYY-MM returns rides with forfait amounts
Backend: PUT /api/fleet/drivers/{driver_id}/rides/{ride_id}/forfait saves forfait amount in MongoDB
Backend: Rides include company (MongoDB) bookings with source='company'
Backend: Rides filtered by month correctly (dateStart to dateEnd)
Backend: Response includes totalRides, totalPrice, totalForfait summary
Frontend: Click 'Voir' on driver row navigates to /fleet/drivers/{driverId}
Frontend: Driver header shows name, phone, email, status (Actif/Inactif), rating
Frontend: Month selector with prev/next arrows navigates months
Frontend: Summary cards show courses count, total price (blue), total forfait (green)
Frontend: Rides table shows date, time, type (Transfer badge), source (SOCIETE badge), addresses, client, price
Frontend: Each ride has forfait input field with amber highlight on change
Frontend: Save forfait button saves value and shows toast confirmation
Frontend: Table footer shows month totals for price and forfait
Frontend: 'Retour aux chauffeurs' button navigates back to driver list
critical_code_review_comments: FleetDriverProfile.js correctly implements all required UI components with proper data-testid attributes
Backend endpoint correctly aggregates company bookings from MongoDB and Zont bookings
Forfait is persisted in driver_forfaits MongoDB collection with correct indexing (driverId, rideId, companyId, month)
Month navigation correctly calculates first/last day of month
Frontend correctly calculates totalForfait from local state (allows seeing changes before save)
Direct URL navigation to /fleet/drivers/{id} redirects to login (auth context required) - This is expected behavior as documented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet Driver Profile feature fully tested and working. Driver profile accessible via /fleet/drivers/{driverId} after login. March 2026 has 3 company bookings for Vova YERITSYAN. Forfaits are editable and save correctly to MongoDB driver_forfaits collection. Month navigation switches between months correctly. Direct URL access requires prior login through /fleet/login.

mocked_api.note: Uses live C# backend (Zont API) + MongoDB. No mocking.
